title: Contract Metadata
description: Human-readable context for smart contracts. Enriches ABI data with titles, descriptions, semantic type annotations, and presentation hints.

chainId.description: The chain ID of the network where the contract is deployed.

address.description: The contract address (lowercase, without checksum). Use this for a specific deployed contract.

factory.description: Factory binding. Use instead of address when this metadata applies to all contracts deployed by a factory.

includes.description: Interface identifiers to include (e.g. "erc20", "erc721"). Included metadata is merged with contract-specific metadata taking priority.

meta.description: Document-level housekeeping: revision tracking, locale, and authenticity.

presentation.description: Visual presentation hints for the UI.

groups.description: Named groups for organizing functions in the UI. Keys are group identifiers referenced by functions.

functions.description: Per-function metadata, keyed by ABI function name.

events.description: Per-event metadata, keyed by ABI event name.

errors.description: Per-error metadata, keyed by ABI error name.

messages.description: EIP-712 typed message metadata, keyed by primary type name (e.g. "Permit", "Order"). Describes off-chain signing flows verified by this contract.

components.description: Custom web components for specialized rendering. Keyed by component name (must be a valid custom element name with a hyphen).

version.description: Metadata revision number. Increment when updating metadata for the same contract.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last metadata update.

signature.description: Optional signature for verifying metadata authenticity.

ComponentConfig.description: Configuration for a custom web component.

src.description: Path to the component JS file, relative to the repo root.

slot.description: Where the component renders. 'function-result' renders below a function's output. 'overview' renders on the contract overview page.

function.description: For function-result slot: the ABI function name this component attaches to.

props.description: Static props passed to the component via the data-props attribute.

Factory.description: Binds metadata to all contracts deployed by a factory. Consumers can match unknown contracts by checking the factory's logs for the deploy event.

deployEvent.description: The event signature emitted when the factory deploys a new contract. The deployed contract address should be identifiable from the event parameters.

shortDescription.description: One-line description of the contract (under 200 characters).

description.description: Detailed description of what the contract does and how it works.

origin.description: Provenance information: who deployed it, when, and relevant history.

category.description: Primary category. Standard values: token, nft, defi, governance, bridge, oracle, utility, game, social, identity. Custom values are allowed.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and categorization.

links.description: External links (website, documentation, block explorer, etc.).

risks.description: Known risks or caveats users should be aware of.

about.description: Rich content sections providing context, history, and explanations.

Presentation.description: Visual presentation hints for the UI.

primaryColor.description: Primary brand color as a hex string (e.g. "#ff04b4").

icon.description: URL to a contract icon or logo.

body.description: Section content. Paragraphs are separated by double newlines (\n\n).

description.description: Optional description of what this group contains.
What the function does, explained for end users.

intent.description: Template string rendered with formatted parameter values. Use {paramName} placeholders (e.g. "Transfer {wad} to {dst}"). Prefix with # to prepend a hash symbol (e.g. "Buy Punk #{punkIndex}" renders as "Buy Punk #7804"). Values are formatted using their displayHint before insertion.

group.description: Group key (must match a key in the top-level groups object).

warning.description: Risk warning displayed to users before interaction.

featured.description: Mark as a primary/featured function. Featured functions are highlighted in the UI (e.g. the main mint, swap, or stake action).

hidden.description: Hide this function from the default UI. Use for internal or admin-only functions that clutter the interface.

stateMutability.description: Overrides the ABI's stateMutability. Use only to correct legacy ABIs that lack this field (e.g. pre-Byzantium contracts).

params.description: Parameter metadata, keyed by ABI parameter name. Use _0, _1, etc. for unnamed parameters.

returns.description: Return value metadata, keyed by ABI return name or _0, _1, etc.

related.description: ABI names of related functions for navigation.

deprecated.description: Deprecation notice. If set, the function should be de-emphasized in the UI.

MessageMeta.description: Metadata for an EIP-712 typed message verified by this contract.

title.description: Human-readable name for this message type.

description.description: What signing this message does, explained for end users.

intent.description: Template string rendered with formatted field values. Use {fieldName} placeholders (e.g. "Permit {spender} to spend {value}").

warning.description: Risk warning displayed to users before signing.

fields.description: Field metadata, keyed by EIP-712 field name.

params.description: Parameter metadata, keyed by ABI parameter name.

description.description: What this error means and when it occurs.

params.description: Parameter metadata, keyed by ABI parameter name.

displayHint.description: Semantic type annotation for display formatting.

inputHint.description: Guidance for how this parameter should be collected from the user.

oneOf.description: Simple display hint indicating what a value represents.
Value in basis points (1/100th of a percent).
Token amount for a specific ERC-20.

values.description: Mapping of numeric values to human-readable labels.

InputHint.description: Guidance for how a parameter should be collected from the user.

min.description: Minimum value (as string to support uint256 range).

max.description: Maximum value (as string to support uint256 range).

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern the value must match.

params.description: Parameter values for the example, keyed by parameter name.
